# Trademarks

MOOTx01 is a registered trademark.

Official generated venues may describe themselves as:

- a MOOTx01 Framework library
- a member of the MOOTx01 Framework
- built with MOOTx01 technology
- MOOTx01 Approved, only after the published conformance and release gates pass

Independent forks and downstream builds may use `compatible with MOOTx01
technology` when truthful, but may not claim to be official or MOOTx01 Approved
unless they pass the approval gate.

ARIA branding remains reserved pending final naming/trademark direction.
